channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Campaigns pay the price for America's secular shift
item.description: America's fastest-growing religious group, the 'nones,' is also one of the hardest and costliest to reach.

item.title: Trump urged Muslim leaders to sign peace deal with Israel after Iran war ends
item.description: President Trump told leaders of several Arab and other Muslim countries during a Saturday conference call that if a deal to end the Iran war is achieved...

item.title: AOC takes more steps toward 2028 run for president
item.description: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says she hasn't decided whether to run for president, but the New York congresswoman is making new moves toward a possible White...

item.title: Scoop: Democrats eyeing 2028 bids court Warren
item.description: Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren, one of the most influential leaders in the progressive movement, is being publicly and privately courted by Democrats...
